## Micron confirms $250 billion US memory fab commitment with New York build advancing

Multi-outlet confirmation of the $250B commitment with an active New York build underway reduces execution uncertainty; this anchors MU's long-term domestic HBM and DRAM supply capacity expansion as a credible, in-progress program.

- A second outlet confirms MU's $250 billion US memory fab commitment, adding that the New York construction is actively progressing.
- The New York build detail provides incremental geographic specificity not present in the Yahoo Finance headline.
- Dual-outlet confirmation raises confidence that the announcement is substantive, not speculative.
- Themes align with AI memory demand, domestic chip sovereignty, and semiconductor cycle positioning.
